summary: Frontend testing iteration 9 - Verified 3 bug fixes: (1) Forex page displays 66 currencies with search input and 7 region filter buttons (All, Asia, Europe, Americas, Middle East, Africa, Oceania), Live/Estimated badges on cards; (2) Weather page temperature display logic verified in code - avg_temp shown ONLY when selectedMonth === today.getMonth(); (3) Festivals page shows dates on cards - 'January 1', 'Late January - February', etc.

integration_issues.issue: Weather page intermittently stuck on 'Loading weather data...' spinner - API returns data correctly (verified via curl) but frontend sometimes fails to render country cards

passed_tests: Feature 1: Forex page displays 66 currencies (was ~11 before fix)
Feature 2: Forex page has search input [data-testid='forex-search-input'] that filters currencies by name/country
Feature 3: Forex page has 7 region filter buttons: All, Asia, Europe, Americas, Middle East, Africa, Oceania
Feature 4: Forex page shows 'Live Rate' badges (12 currencies) and 'Estimated' badges (56 currencies)
Feature 5: Weather page code (line 389) correctly shows temperature ONLY for current month: selectedMonth === today.getMonth() && country.avg_temp
Feature 6: Festivals page displays dates on festival cards with calendar icon
Feature 8: 'Chinese New Year' shows date 'Late January - February'
Feature 9: Other festivals show dates like 'January 26' (Republic Day), 'January 14-17' (Tamil Thai Pongal)
action_items: MEDIUM: Investigate Weather page intermittent loading issue - page sometimes stuck on 'Loading weather data...' even though API returns data. May be a React state update or WorldMap component rendering issue
critical_code_review_comments: Weather.js line 389 correctly implements temperature display logic: `{selectedMonth === today.getMonth() && country.avg_temp ? ` • ${country.avg_temp}` : ''}` - ensures live temp only shown for current month
Forex.js allCurrencyData object at lines 10-94 contains 66 currencies with estimatedRate fallbacks
Festivals.js lines 246-250 displays festival.date with Calendar icon when date exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified: (1) Forex.js has 66 currencies in allCurrencyData with search/filter functionality, (2) Weather.js line 389 has conditional temp display for current month only, (3) Festivals.js displays dates from MongoDB festival documents. Weather page may intermittently fail to load data - API works correctly but frontend rendering sometimes hangs.

features_verified.forex_66_currencies: Forex.js lines 10-94: allCurrencyData object with 66 currencies across 6 regions
features_verified.forex_search_input: Forex.js line 238-245: Search input with data-testid='forex-search-input'
features_verified.forex_region_filters: Forex.js line 96 REGIONS array and lines 251-264 render buttons with data-testid
features_verified.forex_live_estimated_badges: Forex.js lines 346-357: Live Rate (green) and Estimated (amber) badges
features_verified.festival_dates_display: Festivals.js lines 246-250: festival.date with Calendar icon

test_screenshots: .screenshots/forex_currencies.png - Shows 66 currencies, search input, region filters
.screenshots/festivals_january.png - Shows January festivals with dates (January 1, Late January - February, etc.)
.screenshots/festivals_with_dates.png - Shows festival cards with date display
